synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23320 Oracle Linux 9 virt-v2v bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23320
description:
[2.7.1-18.0.1]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- replaced upstream references [Orabug:34089586]

[1:2.7.1-18]
- Fix pnputil driver store after conversion
  resolves: RHEL-128776

[1:2.7.1-17]
- Fix ESP conversion if C:\Windows\Temp has alternate case
  resolves: RHEL-125120
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23320

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23320.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
virt-v2v-2.7.1-18.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
virt-v2v-bash-completion-2.7.1-18.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
virt-v2v-man-pages-ja-2.7.1-18.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
virt-v2v-man-pages-uk-2.7.1-18.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm



SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/virt-v2v-2.7.1-18.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.7.1-18.0.1]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- replaced upstream references [Orabug:34089586]

[1:2.7.1-18]
- Fix pnputil driver store after conversion
  resolves: RHEL-128776

[1:2.7.1-17]
- Fix ESP conversion if C:\Windows\Temp has alternate case
  resolves: RHEL-125120
